author: EXPLORER
content:
RESOLUTION: Frechet Derivative (fderiv)
STATUS: FOUND
MODULE: Mathlib.Analysis.Calculus.FDeriv.Defs
SIGNATURE: 
- HasFDerivAtFilter (f : E → F) (f' : E →L[𝕜] F) (L : Filter (E × E)) : Prop
- HasFDerivAt (f : E → F) (f' : E →L[𝕜] F) (x : E) := HasFDerivAtFilter f f' (𝓝 x ×ˢ pure x)
- HasFDerivWithinAt (f : E → F) (f' : E →L[𝕜] F) (s : Set E) (x : E) := HasFDerivAtFilter f f' (𝓝[s] x ×ˢ pure x)
- HasStrictFDerivAt (f : E → F) (f' : E →L[𝕜] F) (x : E) := HasFDerivAtFilter f f' (𝓝 (x, x))
- fderiv (f : E → F) (x : E) : E →L[𝕜] F
NOTES: Complete implementation in Mathlib. Definition uses IsLittleOTVS for norm-independent formulation. Multiple convenience files (Basic.lean, Comp.lean, Linear.lean, etc.) provide the standard calculus rules. Matches expected usage in semiformal translation.
